text: Ever wondered why AI sometimes makes things up? AI language models predict what words should come next, based on patterns in data. But they’re not programmed to verify truth. They generate what's plausible. This leads to 'hallucinations' — confident statements that aren’t accurate. Understanding this helps us use AI more wisely, knowing it’s not always reliable. Want to learn more about AI? Hit that follow button for deeper insights!
